name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 29 Mar 2023
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Deprecation","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Removed the getApiAccessRules function for eBay API, where the incorrect rate limit was being used."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Fixes"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with the My Account page where payment methods with a minimum spend were not showing, regardless of whether the minimum spend was met."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with the Order/Invoice print doc where the payment method details were not shown in the Payment Options section if there was a minimum spend set on the payment method."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with MYOB export where "},{"text":"MYOB: Error 100 Required: TaxCode is required BuyingDetails.TaxCode","bold":true},{"text":" error when ‘Item is Bought’ is not selected for the product."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
